content_body: Thank you for the relaxing time in your cabin. My husband and I needed this so bad. It was our 1st honey moon getaway in 10 years of marriage. It was worth the wait!!! Your home is very beautiful! I wish I had it next to our mountain In Lafayette GA.… May God Bless you and your home and each guest that may enter your door. The Clark family!!!
title: Thank you for the relaxing time in your cabin.
